Package org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore.adapters

Class ImplicitDeltaRootAdapter

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.impl.AdapterImpl
org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore.adapters.ImplicitDeltaRootAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Adapter, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Adapter.Internal, IElementChangedListener
public class ImplicitDeltaRootAdapter extends org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.impl.AdapterImpl implements IElementChangedListener
Processes the delta, relatively to the given root which is interested to update its implicit children.
